headline.purpose: Page titles, primary section headers; h1 pairs with Storefront Green.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Gentle lift on interactive listing/shop tiles.

shadows.name: floating-action
shadows.purpose: Layered stack under the signature floating CTA.

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions and reveals; no bounce.

motion.name: press
motion.purpose: Signature active-press micro-interaction on pill buttons and the floating CTA.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The primary filled call-to-action; Apron Green pill with the scale(0.95) press.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #00754A; color: #fff; font-family: Inter, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.005em; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 12px 28px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), transform 0.12s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #006241; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(0,117,74,0.4); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.95); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: White pill with Apron Green label + 1px border; lower-emphasis action.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #fff; color: #00754A; font-family: Inter, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.005em; border: 1px solid #00754A; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 12px 28px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), transform 0.12s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f7f9f8; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(0,117,74,0.4); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.95); }

components.name: Estimated Badge
components.description: The honesty marker beside every estimated number — quiet off-white pill, Ink Green text.
components.css: .ds-badge-estimated { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #f7f9f8; color: #33433d; font-family: Inter, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.005em; border: 1px solid #e3e8e6; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 2px 8px; }

components.name: Content Card
components.description: Surface-white card on the off-white canvas; flat at rest, gentle lift on hover for interactive tiles.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e3e8e6; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(30,42,38,0.06), 0 1px 2px rgba(30,42,38,0.04); transition: box-shadow 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(30,42,38,0.10); } .ds-card-title { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.005em; color: #1e2a26; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: #1e2a26; margin: 0; } .ds-card-est { background: #f7f9f8; color: #33433d; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; border: 1px solid #e3e8e6; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 2px 8px; margin-left: 6px; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Surface-white field, hairline border, Apron-Green focus glow with no layout shift.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" placeholder="Etsy shop name or listing URL" />
components.css: .ds-input { background: #fff; color: #1e2a26; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; border: 1px solid #e3e8e6; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 14px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.18s, box-shadow 0.18s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #5b6b65; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #00754A; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0,117,74,0.15); }

components.name: Floating Action
components.description: Signature 56px circular CTA, Apron Green, layered shadow, scale(0.95) press. One per screen.
components.html: <button class="ds-fab" aria-label="Analyze"><svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7"/><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-fab { width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #00754A; border: none; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.24), 0 8px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.14); transition: background 0.18s, transform 0.12s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-fab:hover { background: #006241; } .ds-fab:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-fab:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(0,117,74,0.5); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Inter label; active item carries an Apron Green indicator + Ink text, inactive is Muted Ink.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; color: #5b6b65; text-decoration: none; padding: 9px 14px; border-radius: 8px; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #f7f9f8; color: #1e2a26; } .ds-nav-item--active { color: #1e2a26; font-weight: 600; background: #f7f9f8; } .ds-nav-ind { width: 4px; height: 18px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #00754A; } .ds-nav-item:not(.ds-nav-item--active) .ds-nav-ind { background: transparent; }

narrative.overview: VieRank wears the green apron — the calibrated green system, rounded café-signage geometry, and legible-warm voice of a flagship storefront — pointed at one job: helping an Etsy seller trust what the tool tells them. The defining gesture is honesty made visible: every estimated number wears an 'Estimated' badge; nothing pretends to be ground truth. It is a product surface where design serves the task, calm and well-spaced, distinct from the cluttered number-dense tools sellers tolerate, without tipping into anything playful enough to undermine trust. Warmth comes from green and type, never a beige canvas.
keyCharacteristics: Starbucks-green identity via color + type on a clean off-white (#f7f9f8) — never cream/beige
Honesty as a visual system: estimates always badged, never disguised as fact
One family (Inter) in calibrated weights with tight -0.005em tracking
Strong hierarchy and white space over data density

rules.name: The Gold-Is-Ceremony Rule
rules.body: Ceremony Gold (#cba258) appears only around premium / plan-status moments, never as a general accent.

rules.name: The No-Cream Rule
rules.body: The canvas is off-white (#f7f9f8) or pure white. The warm-neutral cream/sand/paper band is forbidden; warmth lives in green + type.

rules.name: The One-Voice Rule
rules.body: Inter carries the system; change weight and size for hierarchy, never add a second similar sans.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest; shadow is a response to state, not decoration.

dos: Do carry the brand with Storefront/Apron Green and Inter on a clean off-white or white canvas.
Do badge every estimated number with the 'Estimated' chip — honesty is the system.
Do use full-pill buttons (9999px) with the scale(0.95) active press.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest; let shadow respond to state.
Do lead with hierarchy and white space — one primary action per screen.
Do pair status color with a label or icon; placeholders and body clear 4.5:1.
donts: Don't use a cream / sand / beige / paper / parchment canvas — the warm-neutral AI-default is forbidden.
Don't ship SaaS / AI-slop: gradient text, the hero-metric template, identical card grids, tracked-uppercase eyebrows, 01/02/03 markers.
Don't use border-left/right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't build the overwhelming number-dense dashboard (eRank / Marmalead).
Don't tip into the over-playful: no candy colors or emoji-heavy UI.
Don't pair Inter with a second similar sans, or spend Ceremony Gold outside premium / plan-status moments.
